region.title: Select Region
region.description: Select the flood monitoring region within your state.

stations.title: Select Gauges
stations.description: Choose the river gauges you want to monitor. Each gauge becomes a sensor entity.

scan_interval.title: Update Interval
scan_interval.description: How often to poll BOM for new readings. BOM updates data approximately every 15 minutes.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to BOM FTP server. Check your internet connection.
error.no_stations: Please select at least one gauge.

error.cannot_connect: Could not refresh station list from BOM FTP.
